parameters.command: cd /opt/roxy && source venv/bin/activate && python content-pipeline/encoding_presets.py --input {{ $json.path }} --platform tiktok --output /opt/roxy/content-pipeline/encoded/tiktok/
cd /opt/roxy && source venv/bin/activate && python content-pipeline/encoding_presets.py --input {{ $json.path }} --platform youtube-shorts --output /opt/roxy/content-pipeline/encoded/youtube-shorts/

cd /opt/roxy && source venv/bin/activate && python content-pipeline/encoding_presets.py --input {{ $json.path }} --platform instagram-reels --output /opt/roxy/content-pipeline/encoded/instagram-reels/
